description_long: This object is a fantastical sword featuring a long, slender blade composed of translucent pink crystal, with jagged, angular facets that catch the light. The blade is partially encased by a series of dark, stone-like shards that appear to float or are embedded along one edge, giving it a fragmented, magical appearance. The hilt is relatively simple and dark, contrasting with the vibrant crystalline structure above, and is surrounded by a cluster of large, pink crystal formations at the base of the blade. The overall design is highly stylized, suggesting a weapon of magical or ceremonial significance rather than practical use. The materials and construction evoke a sense of fragility and power, with the interplay of sharp crystal and rough stone. This sword would stand out dramatically in any urban environment, appearing almost otherworldly.
description: A striking sword with a translucent pink crystal blade, jagged stone-like shards along one edge, and a dark, simple hilt surrounded by crystal clusters.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow, pointed crystal blade and the symmetrical cluster of pink crystals at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curved, segmented stone-like shards running along one edge of the blade and the depth of the crystal clusters.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full length of the crystal blade and the arrangement of the base crystals, with minimal visibility of the stone shards.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the jagged, floating stone shards and the layered crystal structure.
attribute_blade_type: curved, single-edged, jagged crystal blade with stone shard accents
attribute_handle_design: straight, dark, simple cylindrical handle with minimal ergonomic features
attribute_ornamentation: large pink crystal clusters and floating stone shards
